title: The analysis of the friction stir welding procedure
author: VLADIMIR STATSENKO
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Abstract:  The article presents the analysis of the friction stir welding techniques. An important issue of the work is to determine the temperature of the material in the mixing zone which is possible to do by calculating the design temperature in the shouldered piece of the rotating tool. To obtain the value of heat rate in the welding zone, a programme has been developed within the package Mathlab. The results of the measurements and calculations obtained through the programme are presented in it.
steps_raw: Abstract:  The article presents the analysis of the friction stir welding techniques. To obtain the value of heat rate in the welding zone, a programme has been developed within the package Mathlab. keywords: friction stir welding, technological parameters, temperature field, gap test.
